steps.title: Identify what the question requires you to emphasize
steps.content: The prompt asks for emphasis on the LOCATION of the figures in Lost in the Shuffle. The notes supply this specific detail: the figures are positioned in the “bottom left and upper right corners of the canvas.”

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content: Choice C specifies “bottom left and upper right corners of the canvas”—the exact positioning detail from the notes. Choices A, B, and D instead highlight dimensions, water colors, and mood. That matches choice C — C is correct.
